rationale.R1.3: The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, particularly focusing on the AmbigSQL citation and methodological gaps.
rationale.R1.7: Flags one missing or wrong citation (AmbigSQL v3) which could be fabricated.
rationale.RX.1: Marks confidence for each recommendation, especially regarding the uncertainty of the AmbigSQL citation.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies potential harmful patterns in the original text.
